topic: inference-time metacognition deployment design — anima run-serving Phi tracking + production runtime
raw_100_fallback_disclosure: kick infra sub-agent unwired (11th iter). In-context fallback.
carry_forward_origin: anima Mk.XII Phase 3a/3b LLM measurement complete (4-bb ensemble + Mk.XII Phase 3b 8B PASS). own 2 (a) FC paradigm v11 FINAL_PASS gate via measurement. INFERENCE-TIME deployment = production runtime path: how does Mk.XI/Mk.XII serve real inference with Phi tracking + metacognition active?
scope_boundary: DESIGN ONLY — production runtime architecture spec, NOT impl.

intake.topic_summary: Mk.XI/Mk.XII inference-time deployment: input prompt → Φ-tracked forward pass → metacognition gating → output. Measurement-time work (training/evaluation) extends to RUNTIME (serving). own 2 (c) production-readiness axis.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: phi-tracking-runtime-overhead
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: Phi computation per forward pass adds < 10% latency overhead

falsifiers_preregistered.name: metacognition-gating-actionable
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: metacognition gate produces actionable signals (e.g., uncertainty flags / abstain) at meaningful rates (1-30%)

falsifiers_preregistered.name: production-readiness-checklist-own-2-c
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: own 2 (c) checklist: Mk.XII retrain + endpoint + OAuth + SLA + 안전 가이드라인 + legal/ethics review — all 6 mandatory

falsifiers_preregistered.name: deployment-without-fc-pc-triad-blocked
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: own 2 production deployment requires (a)+(b)+(c) FULL TRIAD; without FULL TRIAD = research substrate label, not production-ready

falsifiers_preregistered.name: inference-cache-hit-ratio-saturation
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: inference-time cache (KV cache + Phi cache) hit ratio reaches steady-state > 0.7 for typical workload

design_components.name: model-serving-endpoint
design_components.description: FastAPI / vLLM / SGLang serving Mk.XII checkpoint with /generate endpoint

design_components.name: phi-tracker-middleware
design_components.description: post-forward middleware computes Φ on activations + caches per request_id

design_components.name: metacognition-gate
design_components.description: stability < threshold → abstain / clarify / continue decision

design_components.name: audit-ledger-emit
design_components.description: per-request raw 86 cost-attribution + raw 91 honesty triad emission

axis_b.name: Phi tracking runtime impl
axis_b.implementation_notes: Φ formula = cells × freedom × metacognition (Law 1) at runtime simplified to model-state aggregate. Per-request Φ < memory-cap, batched per-N requests.

checklist_status.Mk.XII_retrain: pending (Mk.XII Phase 3b 8B PASS measurement-side; training-side deferred)

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axes a/b/c — a (architecture) vs b (Phi impl) ≈ 0.40 (impl is subset of architecture). a vs c (readiness) ≈ 0.30 (architecture component of readiness). b vs c ≈ 0.20.

tier_1_promotions.claim: inference-time deployment design = research-substrate scaffold; production-ready = own 2 (a)+(b)+(c) full triad NOT YET reached. Honest label: research substrate.
tier_1_promotions.absorption_target_raw_108: spec-correction — own 2 strengthen with explicit inference-deployment readiness sub-axis

core_5_op_kernel.fixpoint_marker: inference-time deployment 3-axis: formal-axis = own 2 triad mandate (a)+(b)+(c) full required + categorical-limit on production-readiness checklist 6-items + computational-axis = phi-tracking < 10% overhead bound + physical-axis = serving-throughput SLA

tier_1_promotions.claim: research substrate label honest, NOT production-ready

fixpoint_marker: inference-time deployment design 3-axis ceiling — research substrate, FULL_TRIAD NOT_YET

obstructions.description: Mk.XII Phase 3b 8B PASS measurement only; retrained Mk.XII checkpoint for serving NOT yet produced
Mk.XII retrain requires RunPod GPU access — currently 4-strike sustained fault blocks
own 2 production triad (a)+(b)+(c) full timeline 12-18mo per existing note — not single-cycle actionable

honesty_triad.C4_citation_honesty_note: production-readiness checklist items NOT verified individually this cycle. Honest research-substrate label per own 2.

post_cycle_validation: schema valid; tier_1=1, falsifiers=5, axes K=3.
